summary: Frontend-only test of VANGUARDA.CT landing page. All 7 requested features verified passing: hero headline + CTA, 3 modality cards, 3 authority pillars, sticky WhatsApp float, navbar scroll behaviour, scroll-triggered fade-in animations (useReveal hook on each section), and mobile 390x844 responsiveness.

issues: 'Made with Emergent' platform badge overlaps WhatsApp float button at bottom-right. This is a preview-env overlay (not in app code) but worth noting — in production the WA button is fully visible.

critical_code_review_comments: WhatsApp URL is constructed correctly via wa.me/5511999999999?text=<encodeURIComponent>. WhatsApp's server then redirects to api.whatsapp.com with '+' encoding (verified: phone=5511999999999, text contains 'aula+experimental+gratuita'). Functionally correct.

All required data-testid attributes are present: site-navbar, nav-modalities, nav-authority, nav-cta-button, hero-headline, hero-subheadline, hero-cta-button, modality-card-boxe/muay-thai/kickboxing, pillar-card-0/1/2, authority-cta-button, whatsapp-float-button.
Navbar correctly transitions from bg-transparent at top to bg-black/80 + backdrop-blur-md on scroll.
Smooth scroll verified: nav-modalities -> scrollY=1080, nav-authority -> scrollY=2091.
Fade-in animations implemented via custom useReveal hook (IntersectionObserver) on Hero, Modalities, Authority sections with staggered transitionDelay on cards.
Hero headline matches spec: 'Vença seu maior adversário todos os dias: você mesmo.' (with 'você mesmo.' styled as accent italic).
All three modality descriptions match spec verbatim (Boxe/Muay Thai/Kickboxing).
All three authority pillars present with subtitles: Ambiente Blindado / Sem Ego, Metodologia Própria / Sistema VNG, Infraestrutura de Elite / Equipamento Profissional.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Landing page is fully functional. WhatsApp popup URL appears as api.whatsapp.com (auto-redirect from wa.me) — this is expected WhatsApp behaviour, not a bug. Original window.open call uses wa.me with encoded message as required by spec.
